name: ARVIS Punch
short_description: Become the best boxer by training and fighting with all the boxers and immersive elements. Test your senses and enjoy real boxing simulation at your fingertips.
detailed_description:
Are you ready to become a full-size boxer? With Arvis Punch you can face different enemies to become one, train like a professional boxer in the virtual gym and practice with the interactive and challenging elements. All in Arvis Punch!.

You will start out in our gym, where you can warm up with our intractables and minigames!

Warm enough? Then head to the main stage and START THE FIGHT!

Use your own fists, and Punch your enemies!


In Arvis Punch, you can train as you would expect in a real gym with our physics-based punching bags, and dummy, as well as to simulate a fight with our AI controlled boxers!

Face your opponent during several rounds, and get to knock them out before they knock you!
